title: Financial Investment Behaviour & Risk Analytics
summary: Survey-driven analysis of investor risk–return preferences with SQL-backed data modeling and Power BI dashboards.
highlights: High-return seekers were ~1.5× more likely to prefer Equity Markets; top 3 avenues ~70% of preferences.
Structured raw survey data (40 investors) with cleaning, normalization, and schema design in SQL.
Segmented demographics (~50% aged 26–35; ~35–40% high-risk) using a rule-based equity ranking model.

title: Prompt Engineering — AI Annotation Pipeline
summary: Python project for building and managing an AI annotation workflow (prompting and pipeline structure).
highlights: Repository on GitHub with active development (Python).
Useful for roles touching AI-assisted data labeling and structured prompts.

title: Accident Detection & Alert System (YOLOv8)
summary: Real-time accident detection with model inference, Flask API, and a web UI; includes research publication.
highlights: 92% detection accuracy on test data; trained on 5,000+ labeled traffic images.
Flask backend for inference; responsive HTML/CSS/JS front end.

title: IPL Data Analysis
summary: End-to-end cleaning, EDA, and Power BI dashboards for IPL performance and match insights.
highlights: Strong data quality gains via Pandas/NumPy cleaning (missing values, duplicates).
Dashboards for top run/wicket leaders, team and season comparisons, match outcomes.

title: Retail Sales Data Analysis
summary: Notebook-based exploration of retail sales: trends, segments, and KPI-focused visuals.
highlights: Cleaning and exploration to surface patterns across time and product/customer dimensions.
Communicates findings through charts suitable for stakeholder review.

title: Housing Price Prediction
summary: Regression workflow: preprocessing, EDA, and baseline models for price prediction.
highlights: Feature preparation and model evaluation for housing price drivers.
Good complement to analytics roles requiring statistical thinking.

title: Project 3 (Notebook)
summary: Additional Jupyter notebook work on GitHub; extend README inside the repo for topic details.
highlights: Public notebook repo — rename or document the notebook for stronger recruiter clarity.

title: Personal Portfolio (this site)
summary: Static portfolio showcasing projects, skills, and contact — deployed on Vercel from the `portfolio` repo.
